task_completion.description: OpenOffice Writer is launched and being used.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Apache OpenOffice Writer application window open on the screen.
Look for text in the document mentioning case details such as 'Elena Vargas', 'Derek Haines', or 'PSS-EEO-2024-017'.

task_completion.description: An automated Table of Contents is included in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Table of Contents block in the document, typically with a gray background indicating it is an automated field, or the 'Insert Index/Table' dialog box being used.

task_completion.description: Page numbers are added to the footer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for page numbers located at the bottom margin of the document pages, within the footer area.

task_completion.description: The document contains the required formatted sections and tables.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for distinct section headings (e.g., 'Executive Summary', 'Findings', 'Recommendations') and grid-like tables containing case data (e.g., witness names, evidence items, or timeline dates).

task_completion.description: The report is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenOffice window title bar displaying 'PSS-EEO-2024-017_Investigation_Report.odt' or a Save As dialog showing this filename in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenOffice Writer GUI to create the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that OpenOffice Writer is visible in the screenshots and the agent interacts with its menus/dialogs, rather than using a terminal script (like python or bash) to generate the .odt file directly.

integrity.description: The agent used actual table elements for the required tables.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the tables have visible cell borders or gridlines typical of word processor tables, not just plain text aligned with spaces or tabs.

integrity.description: The Table of Contents is automated, not manually typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the TOC is generated via the software's feature (e.g., gray field shading behind the text, or the TOC dialog is seen), rather than manually typed out line by line.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Case Number: PSS-EEO-2024-017. Complainant: Elena Vargas. Respondent: Derek Haines. Investigating Officer: Sandra Okafor. The report should contain 8 specific sections: Executive Summary, Background, Methodology, Witness Summaries, Evidence, Timeline, Findings, Recommendations. It must include 3 tables: witness list (4 witnesses), evidence inventory (5 items), and timeline (7 events). The findings include 3 allegations (2 Substantiated, 1 Partially Substantiated). The final file must be named PSS-EEO-2024-017_Investigation_Report.odt.
